commands.review_summary:
The PR adds message-processing and skill-execution diagnostics events, emits them from embedded runs, maps them to diagnostics-otel spans/metrics, adds a skill observability doc, and includes adjacent Discord, qa-lab, script, lockfile, and test changes.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings: PR-head source inspection shows raw identifier attrs on spans/metrics and the strict TypeScript attr mismatch. It is not applicable as a current-main bug reproduction because this PR adds a new observability feature.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor-supplied real OTel proof plus maintainer privacy/cardinality review; automation cannot supply the contributor's runtime proof or approve the telemetry contract.
